i18n Language Switcher Module
nodes.description: Self-contained IIFE providing multilingual support (EN/FR/ES) via curated dictionary + Google Translate fallback

nodes.label: Site JS Module
nodes.description: Self-contained IIFE providing mobile nav, accordion, blog toggle, image comparison slider, smooth scroll, and console easter egg

nodes.label: CSS Audit Script
nodes.description: Compares Tailwind CSS classes defined in CSS vs used in HTML to find missing and unused classes

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md Project Configuration
nodes.description: Project-level Claude Code instructions including graphify integration rules

nodes.label: Graph Report (2026-04-11)
nodes.description: Knowledge graph report with 115 nodes, 108 edges, 23 communities for the redesign-2026 project

nodes.label: robots.txt
nodes.description: Search engine crawler configuration allowing all agents and pointing to sitemap

nodes.label: Google Translate Integration
nodes.description: External dependency on Google Translate API for full-page translation of content not covered by curated dictionary

nodes.label: Curated Translation Dictionary
nodes.description: Hand-written FR/ES translations for ~40 key UI strings (nav, footer, CTAs) providing instant high-quality translations

nodes.label: Language Persistence (localStorage)
nodes.description: Language preference persisted via localStorage key ooc-lang and Google Translate cookie googtrans

nodes.label: Nav Overflow Guard
nodes.description: Three-stage responsive nav: full logo -> compact icon logo -> hamburger menu, triggered by content overflow measurement

nodes.label: Image Comparison Slider Widget
nodes.description: Before/after image comparison with pointer drag, dark/light pill label switching

nodes.label: Console Easter Egg (Curious Coder)
nodes.description: ASCII art logo and sustainability message logged to browser console for developers inspecting the site

nodes.label: Tailwind Minified CSS
nodes.description: Compiled Tailwind CSS file audited by the CSS audit script

nodes.label: Custom/JS-Injected Classes Allowlist
nodes.description: Set of ~35 class names injected by JS (nav dropdowns, impact stats, ticker, footer) excluded from missing-class reports

nodes.label: Oasis of Change Website
nodes.description: The oasisofchange.com website, the product of this redesign-2026 project

nodes.label: Sitemap XML
nodes.description: XML sitemap referenced by robots.txt at https://oasisofchange.com/sitemap.xml

nodes.label: Rationale: Dictionary-First Translation Strategy
nodes.description: Curated dictionary applied first for instant, high-quality nav/footer translations without flash of untranslated content, with Google Translate as fallback for remaining page content

nodes.label: Rationale: Three-Stage Nav Collapse
nodes.description: Nav uses three progressive stages (full logo, icon-only logo, hamburger) to maximize horizontal space before collapsing, avoiding premature hamburger on medium viewports

nodes.label: Rationale: Hide Google Translate Chrome
nodes.description: Google Translate default banner, tooltip, and highlight UI is hidden via injected CSS to maintain the site clean design while still using GT for translation

nodes.label: Rationale: Custom Class Exclusion in Audit
nodes.description: JS-injected classes are excluded from the missing-class report because they are styled in site.css or inline, not in the Tailwind build - prevents false positives in the audit

nodes.label: Prefers Reduced Motion Support
nodes.description: Mobile nav respects prefers-reduced-motion media query, skipping slide/fade animations for accessibility

links.detail: Loads Google Translate script and uses google.translate.TranslateElement API
After applying dictionary translations, elements are marked with notranslate class to prevent GT from double-translating
Uses localStorage (ooc-lang) and googtrans cookie for language persistence across page loads
i18n injects switcher into nav structure built by site.js, dispatches resize event to trigger nav overflow recheck
Provides trilingual support (EN/FR/ES) for the Oasis of Change website
initMobileNav() contains the three-stage overflow measurement and collapse logic
initImageSlider() creates pointer-drag before/after comparison widgets
logCuriousCoderMessage() prints ASCII logo and sustainability message to console
prefersReducedMotion() check gates all nav panel animations
Allowlist comments explicitly state classes are injected via site.js (nav dropdown, impact stats, ticker, footer)
Provides core interactive behaviors (nav, accordion, slider) for the website
extract_css_classes() parses public/css/tailwind/tailwind.min.css
CUSTOM_CLASSES set defines ~35 JS-injected class names excluded from missing-class reports
Audits the website CSS to detect visually broken classes and unused CSS bloat
Instructs to read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md before answering architecture questions
Graph report documents MST Website Before/After Case Study Comparison hyperedge; image compare widget provides the UI for such comparisons
Sitemap directive points to https://oasisofchange.com/sitemap.xml
Allows all user-agents to crawl all paths of the website
Explains GT role as fallback: handles ALL remaining page content that the dictionary does not cover
injectGTHideCSS() hides GT default chrome to maintain clean design while leveraging GT translation
Dictionary handles high-visibility nav/footer strings instantly; GT handles the long tail of page content
Explains why curated dictionary is applied before Google Translate: instant rendering, no flash of untranslated content
Code comments explain the three-stage approach: Stage 1 full logo, Stage 2 compact logo to free space, Stage 3 hamburger collapse
ASCII logo and conscious coder messaging reinforces Oasis of Change sustainability brand identity to developers
Comments explain these are expected - styled elsewhere, preventing false positives in the audit
